title: fumana procumbens subsp. baetica
intro: Fumana procumbens subsp. baetica, also known as Baetic Wood Rose or Baetic Fumana, is a subspecies of the Fumana procumbens plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Fumana procumbens subsp. baetica include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. Fumana procumbens subsp. baetica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
